overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Horizon Forbidden West depicting a rain-soaked post-apocalyptic landscape. The clip begins with a slow panoramic view of ruined structures and a massive mechanical Tallneck by a lake, then transitions to third-person gameplay following a female warrior running through rocky, flower-dotted terrain toward a distant waterfall.

scene_state.functional_zone: post-apocalyptic ruins overlooking a lake with scattered mechanical debris

agents.ego_description: camera slowly pans across the rain-soaked ruined landscape, revealing collapsed buildings and a massive mechanical structure in the distance

entered.detail: collapsed multi-story structure with exposed wooden beams and overgrown vegetation
twisted metal debris and broken machinery in the foreground
calm water body reflecting the gray sky, bordered by ruins
massive arching mechanical creature with glowing elements, partially submerged near the shore
jagged rocky peaks shrouded in mist and rain

segments.scene_description: A slow panoramic sweep reveals a desolate post-apocalyptic lakeside under heavy rain. Ruined stone buildings and twisted metal debris litter the foreground, while a massive mechanical Tallneck stands dormant in the distance against a backdrop of misty mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain trail with sparse desert vegetation and small waterfall

events.description: perspective shifts from cinematic panoramic view to third-person following a character running through the terrain

agents.ego_description: female warrior with long red hair and tribal armor runs steadily down a rocky path, navigating through rain-soaked terrain toward a distant waterfall

entered.detail: uneven ground covered with loose stones and patches of grass
tall spiky desert plant with multiple branches
narrow cascade of water flowing down the rocky cliff face
dense patches of white and yellow wildflowers covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to follow a red-haired warrior running through a rocky trail dotted with Joshua trees and wildflowers. Rain continues to fall as she moves toward a small waterfall in the distance, with mountain cliffs rising on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a desolate, panoramic view of a ruined lakeside into a dynamic pursuit through a rain-soaked wilderness. It begins with a slow sweep across a post-apocalyptic shoreline, where ruined stone buildings and twisted metal debris sit beneath a heavy downpour with a dormant mechanical Tallneck looming against misty mountains. As the perspective shifts, the camera begins to follow a red-haired warrior sprinting along a rocky trail. The scene then expands to reveal a landscape dotted with Joshua trees and wildflowers, with steep mountain cliffs rising to the left. The movement finally carries the warrior forward through the falling rain toward a small waterfall in the distance.
